==Snail Fleet==
The Snail Fleet is the unique element of [[Britland]] and is unlocked once the [[Britland INTEL|Britland INTEL tile 9 "Royal Navy"]]. 

The Snail Fleet can consist of 5 ships at a time, and in order to make a ship you must have the blueprint for that ship. These are obtained from various sources.

Ships have 6 stats: Load, Armor, Cannon, Carronade, Sailor Limit, and Fleet Power. Sailor Limit is equal to the HP of a warship and Fleet Power determines the amount of DMG done at the start of a battle. Armor is warship DEF, Cannon is warship ATK, and Carronade is warship RUSH.

==Warships==

Warships are broken up into 3 types: Light, Medium, and Heavy and are obtained from multiple sources. Green and blue rank warships are all light, purple rank warships are all medium, and orange rank warships are all heavy.

{|class="wikitable"
!Warship
!Origin
!Cost in<br>{{RewardIconWithText|NAV Bronze Coin}}
!Cost in<br>{{RewardIconWithText|NAV Silver Coin}}
!Cost in<br>{{RewardIconWithText|NAV Gold Coin}}
|-
|style="background-color:var(--green-bg)"|Caravel
|[[Britland INTEL|Britland INTEL tile 9 "Royal Navy"]]
|2,560
|
|
|-
|style="background-color:var(--green-bg)"|Hansa Sailboat
|Exchange [[Britland Cards#Tier 2 (green)|7 green Anchors]]
|3,840
|
|
|-
|style="background-color:var(--blue-bg)"|Yamato Warship
|Exchange [[Britland Cards#Tier 3 (blue)|7 blue Anchors]]
|5,120
|2,560
|
|-
|style="background-color:var(--blue-bg)"|Galleon
|[[Britland INTEL#Fleet Management|Fleet Management INTEL tile 5 "Llayd's Register" Lv.1]]
|5,760
|2,880
|
|-
|style="background-color:var(--blue-bg)"|Corvette
|Defeat enemies in [[Mysterious Sea#Pirate Paradise|Pirate Paradise Fl. 4]]
|7,680
|3,840
|
|-
|style="background-color:var(--blue-bg)"|Light Cruiser
|[[Britland INTEL#Fleet Management|Fleet Management INTEL tile 5 "Llayd's Register" Lv.2]]
|7,040
|3,520
|
|-
|style="background-color:var(--blue-bg)"|Flemish Galleon
|Complete [[Britland Key Clues#Britland Treasure|Britland Key Clue Event "Hoxne Treasure"]] in Londorn
|6,400
|3,200
|
|-
|style="background-color:var(--purple-bg)"|Turtle Ship
|Exchange [[Britland Cards#Tier 4 (purple)|7 purple Anchors]]
|7,680
|5,120
|
|-
|style="background-color:var(--purple-bg)"|Royal Battleship
|[[Britland INTEL#Fleet Management|Fleet Management INTEL tile 16 "RINA" Lv.1]]
|8,640 
|5,760
|
|-
|style="background-color:var(--purple-bg)"|Carrack
|[[Britland INTEL#Fleet Management|Fleet Management INTEL tile 16 "RINA" Lv.2]]
|9,600
|6,400
|
|-
|style="background-color:var(--purple-bg)"|Fortune Ship
|Defeat [[Mysterious Sea#Dragon Palace|Dragon Palace Fl. 2 enemies]]
|10,560
|7,040
|
|-
|style="background-color:var(--purple-bg)"|Venetian Gunboat
|Defeat [[Mysterious Sea#Poseidon's Temple|Poseidon's Temple Fl.1 Boss]]
|11,520
|7,680
|
|-
|style="background-color:var(--orange-bg)"|HMS Victory
|Complete [[Britland Key Clues#Gloria Age|Gloria Age Key Clue Events]]
|
|8,640 
|2,880
|-
|style="background-color:var(--orange-bg)"|Soleil Royal
|Acquire [[Britland INTEL#Fleet Management|Fleet Management tile 16 "RINA" Lv.3]]
|
|7,680
|2,560
|-
|style="background-color:var(--orange-bg)"|St. Trinidad
|Exchange [[Britland Cards#Tier 5 (orange)|7 orange Anchors]]
|
|9,600
|3,200
|-
|style="background-color:var(--orange-bg)"|Roma Ranger
|Defeat [[Mysterious Sea#Mecha Sea|Mecha Sea Fl.5 mid-boss]]
|
|10,560
|3,250
|-
|style="background-color:var(--orange-bg)"|Treasure Tree
|Defeat [[Mysterious Sea#Dragon Palace|Dragon Palace Fl.5 boss]]
|
|11,520
|3,840
|}

==Stats==
Here are the stats of all warships at their maximum level.

===Light Warships===
{|class="wikitable"
!Warship
!Load
!Armor
!Cannon
!Carronade 
!Sailor Limit
!Fleet Power
!Bonus Ability
|-
|style="background-color:var(--green-bg)" |Caravel
|2,744
|2,587
|4,205
|2,423
|244
|1,500
|Per 500 FAME, Cannon +2
|-
|style="background-color:var(--green-bg)" |Hansa Sailboat 
|3,187
|2,752
|7,132
|2,719
|266
|1,604
|Per 500 CIV, Load +2
|-
|style="background-color:var(--blue-bg)" |Yamato Warship 
|2,823
|2,930
|4,500
|4,566
|254
|1,866
|Per 500 FAME, Armor +5
|-
|style="background-color:var(--blue-bg)" |Galleon
|2,948
|2,754
|4,914
|4,726
|269
|1,932
|Per 500 CIV, Cannon +5
|-
|style="background-color:var(--blue-bg)" |Corvette
|3,527
|2,884
|4,763
|4,806
|279
|1,998
|Per 500 ART, Load +5
|-
|style="background-color:var(--blue-bg)" |Light Cruiser
|2,973
|2,966
|4,654
|5,008
|270
|1,964
|Per 500 TECH, Carronade +5
|-
|style="background-color:var(--blue-bg)" |Flemmish Galleon
|3,255
|2,772
|4,661
|4,654
|266
|1,932
|Per 500 FTH, Load +5
|}

===Medium Warships===
{|class="wikitable"
!Warship
!Load
!Armor
!Cannon
!Carronade
!Sailor Limit
!Fleet Power 
!Bonus Ability
|-
|style="background-color:var(--purple-bg)" |Turtle Ship
|6,583
|7,877
|8,711 
|8,876
|726 
|4,006
|Per 500 FAME, Armor +7
|-
|style="background-color:var(--purple-bg)" |Royal Battleship
|6,648
|7,547
|9,324
|8,845
|736
|4,046
|Per 500 CIV, Cannon +7 
|-
|style="background-color:var(--purple-bg)" |Carrack
|7,064
|7,603
|8,916
|8,918
|744
|4,082
|Per 500 ART, Load +7
|-
|style="background-color:var(--purple-bg)" |Fortune Ship
|6,770
|8,225
|9,001
|8,992
|752
|4,142
|Per 500 TECH, Armor +7
|-
|style="background-color:var(--purple-bg)" |Venetian Gunboat
|6,892
|7,701
|9,057
|9,657
|756
|4,163
|Per 500 FTH, Carronade +7
|}

===Heavy Warships===
{|class="wikitable"
!Warship
!Load
!Armor
!Cannon
! Carronade
!Sailor Limit
!Fleet Power 
!Bonus Ability
|-
|style="background-color:var(--orange-bg)" |HMS Victory
|14,562
|14,591
|12,967
|14,701 
|1,657
|7,390
|Per 500 FAME, Cannon +10
|-
|style="background-color:var(--orange-bg)" |Soleil Royal
|13,907
|14,641
|14,708
|14,739
|1,661
|7,436
|Per 500 CIV, Load +10
|-
|style="background-color:var(--orange-bg)" |St. Trinidad
|14,632
|14,729 
|14,742
|15,414
|1,664
|7,440
|Per 500 ART, Carronade +10
|-
|style="background-color:var(--orange-bg)" |Roma Ranger
|14,721
|15,534
|14,809
|14,807
|1,673
|7,484
|Per 500 TECH, Armor +10
|-
|style="background-color:var(--orange-bg)" |Treasure Tree 
|14,869 
|14,851
|15,660
|14,914
|1,679
|7,537
|Per 500 FTH, Cannon +10
|}

== Upgrading Warships ==
Upgrading warships depends on the rank (color) of the warship. The higher the rank, the more things that can be upgraded.

=== {{Retext|Green Warships|green }}===
{|class="mw-collapsible mw-collapsed wikitable"
! rowspan="2" |Level
! colspan="3" |Artillery Cabin
! colspan="3" |Side Deck
|-
!{{RewardIcon|NAV Bronze Coin}}
!{{RewardIcon|NAV Silver Coin}}
!{{RewardIcon|NAV Gold Coin}}
!{{RewardIcon|NAV Bronze Coin}}
!{{RewardIcon|NAV Silver Coin}}
!{{RewardIcon|NAV Gold Coin}}
|-
|2
|60
|
|
|50
|
|
|-
|3
|130
|
|
|110
|
|
|-
|4
|190
|
|
|160
|
|
|-
|5
|260
|
|
|220
|
|
|-
|6
|330
|
|
|270
|
|
|-
|7
|390
|
|
|330
|
|
|-
|8
|460
|
|
|380
|
|
|-
|9
|530
|
|
|440
|
|
|-
|10
|590
|
|
|500
|
|
|-
|11 
|660
|
|
|550
|
|
|-
|12 
|730
|
|
|610
|
|
|-
|13 
|790
|
|
|660
|
|
|-
|14
|860
|
|
|720
|
|
|-
|15
|930
|
|
|770
|
|
|-
|16
|990
|
|
|830
|
|
|-
|17
|1060
|
|
|880
|
|
|-
|18
|1130
|
|
|940
|
|
|-
|19
|1200
|
|
|1000
|
|
|-
|20
|1260
|
|
|1050
|
|
|-
|Total
|12550
|
|
|10470
|
|
|-
|}

=== {{Retext|Blue Warships|blue}} ===
{|class="mw-collapsible mw-collapsed wikitable"
! rowspan="2" |Level
! colspan="3" |Artillery Cabin 
! colspan="3" |Side Deck 
! colspan="3" |Ammunition Cabin
|-
!{{RewardIcon|NAV Bronze Coin}}
!{{RewardIcon|NAV Silver Coin}}
!{{RewardIcon|NAV Gold Coin}}
!{{RewardIcon|NAV Bronze Coin}}
!{{RewardIcon|NAV Silver Coin}}
!{{RewardIcon|NAV Gold Coin}}
!{{RewardIcon|NAV Bronze Coin}}
!{{RewardIcon|NAV Silver Coin}}
!{{RewardIcon|NAV Gold Coin}}
|-
|2
|60
|
|
|50
|
|
|30
|
|
|-
|3
|130
|
|
|110
|
|
|60
|
|
|-
|4
|190
|
|
|160
|
|
|100
|
|
|-
|5
|260
|
|
|220
|
|
|130
|
|
|-
|6
|330
|
|
|270
|
|
|160
|
|
|-
|7
|390
|
|
|330
|
|
|200
|
|
|-
|8
|460
|
|
|380
|
|
|230
|
|
|-
|9
|530
|
|
|440
|
|
|260
|
|
|-
|10
|590
|
|
|500
|
|
|300
|
|
|-
|11
|660
|60
|
|550
|50
|
|330
|30
|
|-
|12
|730
|150
|
|610
|130
|
|360
|80
|
|-
|13
|790
|240
|
|660
|200
|
|400
|120
|
|-
|14 
|860
|330
|
|720
|280
|
|430
|170
|
|-
|15
|930
|420
|
|770
|350
|
|460
|210
|
|-
|16
|990
|520
|
|830
|430
|
|500
|260
|
|-
|17
|1060
|310
|
|880
|510
|
|530
|300
|
|-
|18
|1130
|700
|
|940
|580
|
|560
|350
|
|-
|19
|1200
|790
|
|1000
|660
|
|600
|390
|
|-
|20
|1260
|880
|
|1050
|730
|
|630
|440
|
|-
|Total
|12550
|4700
|
|10470
|3920
|
|6270
|2350
|
|-
|}

=== {{Retext|Purple Warships|purple}} ===
{|class="mw-collapsible mw-collapsed wikitable"
! rowspan="2" |Level
! colspan="3" |Artillery Cabin
! colspan="3" |Side Deck
! colspan="3" |Ammunition Cabin
Crew Cabin 
|-
!{{RewardIcon|NAV Bronze Coin}}
!{{RewardIcon|NAV Silver Coin}}
!{{RewardIcon|NAV Gold Coin}}
!{{RewardIcon|NAV Bronze Coin}}
!{{RewardIcon|NAV Silver Coin}}
!{{RewardIcon|NAV Gold Coin}}
!{{RewardIcon|NAV Bronze Coin}}
!{{RewardIcon|NAV Silver Coin}}
!{{RewardIcon|NAV Gold Coin}}
|-
|2
|60
|
|
|50 
|
|
|30
|
|
|-
|3
|130 
|
|
|110
|
|
|60
|
|
|-
|4
|190
|
|
|160
|
|
|100
|
|
|-
|5
|260

|
|
|220
|
|
|130 
|
|
|-
|6
|330
|
|
|270
|
|
|160
|
|
|-
|7
|390
|
|
|330
|
|
|200
|
|
|-
|8
|460
|
|
|380
|
|
|230
|
|
|-
|9
|530
|
|
|440
|
|
|260
|
|
|-
|10 
|590
|
|
|500
|
|
|300 
|
|
|-
|11
|660
|60 

|
|550
|50
|
|330
|30
|
|-
|12
|730
|150
|
|610
|130 
|
|360
|80
|
|-
|13
|790
|240

|
|660
|200
|
|400
|120
|
|-
|14
|860
|330
|
|720
|280
|
|430
|170
|
|-
|15
|930
|420
|
|770
|350
|
|460
|210
|
|-
|16
|990
|520
|
|830
|430
|
|500
|260
|
|-
|17
|1060
|610
|
|880
|510
|
|530
|300
|
|-
|18
|1130
|700
|
|940
|580
|
|560
|350
|
|-
|19
|1200
|790
|
|100
|660
|
|600
|390
|
|-
|20
|1260
|880
|
|1050
|730 
|
|630
|440
|
|-
|21
|1330
|970
|60
|1110
|810
|50
|660
|490
|30
|-
|22
|1400
|1060
|160
|1160
|890
|140
|700
|530
|80
|-
|23
|1460
|1150
|270
|1220
|960
|220
|730
|580
|130
|-
|24
|1530
|1250
|370
|1270
|1040
|310
|760
|620
|180
|-
|25
|1600
|1340
|470
|1330
|1110
|390
|800
|670
|240
|-
|26
|1660
|1430
|570
|1390
|1190
|480
|830
|710
|290
|-
|27
|1730
|1520
|680
|1440
|1270
|560
|860
|760
|340
|-
|28
|1800
|1610
|780
|1500
|1340
|650
|900
|810
|390
|-
|29
|1960
|1700
|880
|1550
|1420
|740
|930
|850
|440
|-
|30
|1930
|1790
|990
|1610
|1490
|820
|960
|900
|490
|-
|Total
|28850
|18520
|5230
|24050
|15440
|4360
|14400
|9270
|2610
|-
|}

=== {{Retext|Orange Warships|orange}} ===
{|class="mw-collapsible mw-collapsed wikitable"
! rowspan="2" |Level
! colspan="3" |Artillery Cabin
! colspan="3" |Side Deck
! colspan="3" |Ammunition Cabin
Crew Cabin 

Supply Cabin 
|-
!{{RewardIcon|NAV Bronze Coin}}
!{{RewardIcon|NAV Silver Coin}}
!{{RewardIcon|NAV Gold Coin}}
!{{RewardIcon|NAV Bronze Coin}}
!{{RewardIcon|NAV Silver Coin}}
!{{RewardIcon|NAV Gold Coin}}
!{{RewardIcon|NAV Bronze Coin}}
!{{RewardIcon|NAV Silver Coin}}
!{{RewardIcon|NAV Gold Coin}}
|-
|2
|60
|
|
|50
|
|
|30
|
|
|-
|3
|130 
|
|
|110
|
|
|60
|
|
|-
|4
|190
|
|
|160
|
|
|100
|
|
|-
|5
|260
|
|
|220
|
|
|130
|
|
|-
|6
|330 
|
|
|270
|
|
|160
|
|
|-
|7
|390
|
|
|330
|
|
|200
|
|
|-
|8
|460
|
|
|380
|
|
|230
|
|
|-
|9
|530
|
|
|440
|
|
|260
|
|
|-
|10 
|590
|
|
|500
|
|
|300 
|
|
|-
|11
|660
|60

|
|550
|50 
|
|330
|30
|
|-
|12
|730
|150
|
|610 
|130
|
|360
|80
|
|-
|13
|790
|240

|
|660
|200 
|
|400
|120 
|
|-
|14
|860
|330
|
|720
|280
|
|430
|170
|
|-
|15
|930
|720
|
|770
|350
|
|460
|210
|
|-
|16
|990
|520
|
|830
|430
|
|500
|260
|
|-
|17
|1060 
|610
|
|880
|510
|
|530
|300
|
|-
|18
|1130
|700
|
|940
|580
|
|560
|350
|
|-
|19
|1200
|790
|
|1000
|660
|
|600
|390
|
|-
|20
|1260
|880
|
|1050
|730
|
|630
|440
|
|-
|21
|1330
|970
|60
|1110
|810
|50
|660
|490
|30
|-
|22
|1400
|1060
|160
|1160
|890
|140
|700
|530
|80
|-
|23
|1460
|1150
|270
|1220
|960
|220
|730
|580
|130
|-
|24
|1530
|1250
|370
|1270
|1040
|310
|490
|620
|180
|-
|25
|1600
|1340
|470
|1330
|1110
|390
|800
|670
|240
|-
|26
|1660
|1430
|570
|1390
|1190
|480
|830
|710
|290
|-
|27
|1730
|1520
|680
|1440
|1270
|560
|860
|760
|340
|-
|28
|1800
|1610
|780
|1500
|1340
|650
|900
|810
|390
|-
|29
|1860
|1700
|880
|1550
|1420
|740
|930
|850
|440
|-
|30
|1930
|1790
|990
|1610
|1490
|820
|960
|900
|490
|-
|31
|2000
|1880
|1090
|1660
|1570
|910
|1000
|940
|540
|-
|32
|2060
|1980
|1190
|1720
|1650
|990
|1030
|990
|600
|-
|33
|2130
|2070
|1290
|1780
|1720
|1080
|1070
|1030
|650
|-
|34
|2200
|2160
|1400
|1830
|1800
|1160
|1100
|1080
|700
|-
|35
|2260
|2250
|1500
|1890
|1870
|1250
|1130
|1120
|750
|-
|36
|2330
|2340
|1600
|1940
|1950
|1340
|1170
|1170
|800
|-
|37
|2400
|2430
|1710
|2000
|2030
|1420
|1200
|1220
|850
|-
|38
|2460
|2520
|1810
|2050
|2100
|1510
|1230
|1260
|900
|-
|39
|2530
|2610
|1910
|2110
|2180
|1590
|1270
|1310
|960
|-
|40
|2600
|2700
|2010
|2160
|2250
|1680
|1300
|1350
|1010
|-
|Total
|51820
|41460
|20740
|43190
|34560
|17290
|25900
|20740
|10370
|}

[[Category:Locations]]
[[Category:Realm]]
[[Category:Britland]]
